form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr5) over 2240m at Melton, beaten 25 m by Mount Barker Boy (2:43.00) in 3yo No NR on April 10 at $101. At the run before good run when 3rd (Fr2) over 1785m at Stawell, at the bell was 2nd-3.7 beaten 6 m by Rocknroll Willow (2:11.40) in 0-2 WINs on April 3 at $5. Rates highly and can atone.

Hung in and contacted marker pegs as the field raced towards the first turn.

form.formComment: Eight-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at Mt Gambier and Terang. Last start posted a big 13 m win as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr2) at Mt Gambier (2:08.40) beating Cee Whos Bettor in 2 LIFETIME WINS on April 7 at $1.55 at the bell was leading 5.4. Major player again.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third after a quick start, behind Steam Machine at Ararat over 2195m in a 0-1 WIN on March 23 at $23. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Rocknroll Willow at Stawell over 1785m in a 0-2 WINs on April 3 at $16. Rates highly. Sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly who is racing well. Good first up, posted a big 6 m win as favourite (Fr6) at Stawell (2:11.40) beating Namella in 0-2 WINs on April 3 at $1.25 at the bell was leading 3.7. Won at her only second-up run and can make it back-to-back wins.
